strengths: 15+ years of broad full-stack engineering across web, mobile, embedded
Founder of an open-source geo-data platform showing entrepreneurial drive
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
concerns: No advanced degree or formal AI/ML research background
AI experience is recent and limited; no shipped AI products or platforms at scale
No demonstrated director-level IC influence advising strategic customers or partners
response.justification: The candidate has solid full-stack engineering breadth and meets the 15-year experience bar, with entrepreneurial signal from founding GISCollective and some recent MCP/agent tooling work. However, the role is a director-level IC focused on AI strategy, requiring recognized AI expertise and shipped AI products — the resume shows only early, recent AI exposure with no demonstrated platforms, publications, or strategic advisory experience.
